# IntakeAI
> AI patient intake software for healthcare practices

IntakeAI replaces paper patient intake forms with conversational AI. It automates patient intake calls, captures structured clinical data, syncs to EHR systems, and drafts preliminary diagnoses — so providers can focus on care. HIPAA compliant and SOC 2 Type II certified.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://aipatientintake.com
- Blog: https://aipatientintake.com/blog
- Privacy Policy: https://aipatientintake.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://aipatientintake.com/terms

## Product
- Conversational AI intake (voice and text)
- Automatic EHR population (Epic, Cerner, Athenahealth, eClinicalWorks, AllScripts)
- Diagnosis draft generation
- 30+ language support
- HIPAA compliant, SOC 2 Type II certified
- Pricing: $2.50/intake (Essentials), $3.50/intake (Professional), Enterprise custom
